# Postflop Bridge Bundles

These files are compatibility artifacts for the canonical PokerMaster preset catalog.

- `desktop-postflop.presets.json`: bootstrap bundle for desktop-style inspection tooling
- `wasm-postflop.presets.json`: bootstrap bundle for browser-style inspection tooling

The richer, fully-expanded bundle can be regenerated later with `research.postflop_vendor.write_postflop_bundle()`.
